acceptance_criteria.text: engine service: docker build succeeds via Dockerfile
engine service: container starts and responds to a basic health check
acceptance_criteria.check: docker run -d --name hivemind-engine-check -p 15051:50051 hivemind-engine:cdr-6.2.1 ; then run the image's own HEALTHCHECK equivalent from host: nc -z 127.0.0.1 15051 (or docker inspect --format='{{.State.Health.Status}}' after HEALTHCHECK interval elapses)
acceptance_criteria.expected: container State.Status=running, TCP connect to 50051 succeeds, log line 'LISTENING 0.0.0.0:50051' present in docker logs

acceptance_criteria.text: api service: docker build succeeds via Dockerfile
api service: container starts and responds to a basic health check
acceptance_criteria.check: docker run -d --name hivemind-api-check -p 18080:8080 hivemind-api:cdr-6.2.1 ; curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:18080/health

acceptance_criteria.text: agents service: docker build succeeds via Dockerfile
agents service: container starts and responds to a basic health check
acceptance_criteria.check: docker run -d --name hivemind-agents-check -p 15052:50052 hivemind-agents:cdr-6.2.1 ; python3 -c "import socket; socket.create_connection(('127.0.0.1', 15052), timeout=3)" from host, or docker exec ... the image's own HEALTHCHECK command
acceptance_criteria.expected: TCP connect succeeds if server.py's serve() reaches server.start() before the LLM client construction step blocks/fails; if create_llm_client() raises before binding the port (no LLM_PROVIDER configured), this is disclosed explicitly in self-consistency.json rather than silently reported as passing

test_spec_mapping.test_spec_item: docker build succeeds for each Dockerfile
docker run + basic health-check curl/script confirms service starts
